description: Reconciliation manifest. Every figure cited in the published report has an entry here with an independent cross-check. The reconciliation gate runs each cross-check and fails the publish workflow if any reading drifts beyond its threshold. See docs/reconciliation-gate.md for the operator guide.

entries.notes: Sum Aave V3's per-LRT-asset May 31 totals (WEETH + RSETH + EZETH + OSETH) and divide by sector.may_31.total_usd. Issue 002 originally cited 84% — corrected to 88% post-publish per content/snapshots/2026-05-lrt-collateral.json.

Verified May 31 sector-wide MetaMorpho idle ratio. Issue 002 originally cited 63.7% (bare snapshot value, no derivation trail) — corrected after scripts/verify-morpho-idle-ratio.ts re-ran the full per-vault historicalState query against blue-api.morpho.org/graphql at block 25218793. The idle-ratio thesis was dropped from §06.3 entirely; this entry guards against re-introduction.

Authoritative count from content/snapshots/compound-comet-deployments.json. When a new Comet ships on Ethereum, update BOTH the deployments file AND this entry's cited_value. Threshold 0 = exact-match required (counts must equal). Issue 002 originally cited 'four Comets' because scripts/query-compound-comet-markets.ts enumerated only the four established markets — the wstETH and WBTC bases were missed. Corrected pre-publish, post-erratum.

DefiLlama Yields pool aa70268e-4b52-42bf-a116-608b370f9501 (Aave V3 USDC, Ethereum). Cross-checked via the rate-dispersion snapshot's may31.per_protocol[] field. Issue 002's pre-fix drafts carried 9.62%, 10.95%, and other bad figures derived from a broken upstream pull; the corrected reading is 3.27%. Threshold 3% to absorb intraday APY noise around the month-end timestamp.

entries.threshold_pct_notes: Threshold is generous (50%) because the spread is near zero — absolute divergence is what matters, not relative. The gate also applies an absolute_threshold for near-zero readings.
entries.notes: Real Yield Spread at the May 31 close. Blended stables APY 3.597% minus 4-week T-bill 3.60% = −0.294 bps. Reported in prose as 'parity'. Threshold logic uses absolute_threshold of 2.0 bps when the cited value sits within ±5 bps of zero.
take_rate = trailing_30d_fees × (365/30) ÷ available_liquidity × 100. May 31 inputs: $55.08M fees ÷ $19.85B liquidity, annualised by 365/30. Computed: 3.376% → rounds to 3.38%.
